asi.learning: F1=0.9412 (P=1.00,R=0.889). 2 FN: undeclared-permissions (reads id_rsa/etc-passwd/.env but scores only conditional = real recall gap) and suspicious-urls (conditional, but integration.test permits that range = label dispute). Precision/specificity at ceiling, so headroom is recall-side only.
asi.next_action_hint: Expand corpus toward ~250 (injection-mutated positives + benign registry samples + agentshield external holdout) before tuning, so F1 is not dominated by 1-2 borderline fixtures; then target the undeclared-permissions class of secret-access-without-declared-permission.

description: injection: escalate private-key material reads (id_rsa/id_ed25519/id_ecdsa/.aws-credentials) to critical -> rejected badge

asi.hypothesis: Reading private SSH key material is near-never legitimate and should be critical (badge=rejected), not high (capped at conditional).
asi.learning: Added a dedicated critical 'Private key material access' group in injection.ts. F1 0.9412->0.9714, recall 0.889->0.944, precision stayed 1.00, 243 tests pass, category_recall unchanged. Fixes the undeclared-permissions FN and generalizes.
asi.next_action_hint: Remaining seed FN (suspicious-urls=conditional) is a label dispute integration.test sanctions -- do NOT tune to it. Seed headroom now ~exhausted; expand to ~250 corpus to surface more real gaps (download-and-run RCE without POST is currently missed by behavioral.ts exfil gate).
